title: Important Update: New TDS Return Forms from FY 2026-27 – Form 24Q Replaced by Form 138, Q1 Due July 31, 2026
content:
# Important Update: New TDS Return Forms from FY 2026-27 – Form 24Q Replaced by Form 138, Q1 Due July 31, 2026

Ek important update hai. Government ne Tax Year 2026-27 se TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) return filing ke liye naye forms announce kiye hain, replacing the old ones. Yeh changes Income-tax Act, 2025 aur Income-tax Rules, 2026 ke under aaye hain.

Here’s what you need to know:

*   **Old Forms Replaced:** Previously, for salary TDS, we used Form 24Q. Ab, **Form 24Q ko replace karke Form 138 kar diya gaya hai** for Tax Year 2026-27 onwards. Similarly, Form 26Q is now Form 140, Form 27Q is Form 144, and Form 27EQ (TCS) is Form 143.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh naye forms aur corresponding naye sections (jaise Section 392 for salary TDS) **April 1, 2026 se effective ho chuke hain**.
*   **Q1 Return Due Date:** Financial Year 2026-27 ke **Q1 (April to June 2026) ka TDS return (Form 138) file karne ki due date July 31, 2026 hai**. Please ensure timely compliance to avoid any late fees.
*   **Purpose of Change:** The Income Tax Department ne yeh changes tax compliance ko simpler, standardized, aur more technology-driven banane ke liye kiye hain. Naye forms auto-prefill, real-time validations, aur dropdowns jaise features ke saath aate hain to minimize errors.
*   **Important Note:** Old forms are still applicable for transactions up to March 31, 2026. Naye form numbers sirf April 1, 2026 se onwards transactions ke liye use honge.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Press Release on Income-tax Act, 2025 and Rules here](https://pib.gov.in/PressReleasePage.aspx?PRID=2010189)

*Published on: 9 July 2026*
